text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...So basically, you need to use the previous
formula to solve it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, yesss. I see, I see...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That I haven't the slightest inkling what you
are talking about!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Keep this up and in all certainty you're going to fail tomorrow's quiz.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Anything but that! I must avoid extra classes this
week at all costs!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you realize the gravity of the situation? I
made a promise to perform my latest opera to
Urara and Doto!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Then how about showing a little more effort?
You'll never pass if you can't remember these
equations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's the lack of emotion and backstory that's the
issue. How could I even feign interest without—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I've got it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must instruct me in the key of D major! I'll
surely remember it that way!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know you have what it takes, Hayahide! Being
an operatic prodigy, I can see it—actually, I
guarantee it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: With haste, I say!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...As you can see, X is an essential component to
five and six.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: This is factorization. Do you understand?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hrm... The characters have no chemistry. Their
lines come off a bit awkward, don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do not overthink this. The transformation will
happen with a little more emotion!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was asking for your comprehension level, not a
critique!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aha, no problem on that front! I have
comprehended something—a truth of the world,
in fact!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
When viewed through the lens of opera, there's
nothing I can't understand!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, at this rate, I shall conquer all and assume
my place as the irrefutable Overlord in no time!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm glad to see you have some semblance of motivation. Sigh...
